SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[release-hygiene] active: keep changelog user-focused and follow release workflow.'"

UserPromptSubmit.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[release-hygiene] reminder: activate venv in-command, use flat user-benefit bullets, and avoid sensitive data.'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[release-hygiene] session end: verify release checks and changelog quality status are reported.'"
